name: K10 - San Diego — Freeway
author: k10-san-diego
_about: A drivable FREEROAM loop of San Diego's central freeway box, built straight from OpenStreetMap: I-5 (west leg) -> SR-52 (north leg) -> SR-163 (east leg) -> I-8 (south leg), closed at the four stack interchanges. BOTH directional carriageways plus EVERY on/off ramp and interchange connector (cloverleaf/direct N<->S) come across as separate OSM motorway_link ways. Real USGS 3DEP terrain, physical concrete barrier WALLS along every freeway edge so you can't fly off into the desert, Mission Bay + the Pacific as water. Desert-themed dry ground (no green, no palms).

location._anchor: I-8 in Mission Valley (straight WB stretch near the SR-163 stack) - AC_START snaps to the nearest freeway edge here.

source._doc: osm-network = fetch every drivable way of the listed highway classes inside bbox straight from Overpass, then node-snap them into one connected road GRAPH (scripts/gps/network.py). No KML. bbox is (south, west, north, east). motorway + motorway_link gives the 4 freeways, both carriageways, and every ramp/interchange connector in the box.
source._refs_doc: Mainline carriageways are restricted to these exact OSM refs so I-805 (which threads the same box and CROSSES CA-163) is excluded. Ramps/links are kept regardless, then network.keep_largest_component prunes I-805's now-orphaned ramps.

network._doc: Graph-build knobs (scripts/gps/network.py). snap_grid kept SMALL so the two ~20 m-apart directional carriageways stay separate edges while coincident OSM ramp/mainline nodes still merge.

scenery._doc: Desert dressing. dry_only kills irrigated green (all dry chaparral/dirt); palms off. Physical WALLS replace the visual guardrail; gantries stay for freeway feel.

walls._doc: Physical concrete barrier along both edges of every freeway-class edge (build_network_mesh -> 1WALL_*). height_m tall enough to stop a launched car; offset_m past the shoulder outer lip.

viaduct._doc: Real 3DEP carries the terrain grades; OSM bridge LAYER tags carry the flyovers. So the synthetic dip-bridge is OFF (max_lift_m 0) - only layer_height_m raises OSM-tagged flyover decks so interchanges grade-separate.

terrain._doc: Override the DEM bbox to reach WEST past I-5 over Mission Bay to the coast, so the bay + ocean have ground under them.

ocean._doc: Pacific to the true WEST: carve terrain west of lon_from below sea level + a flat sea-level plane out to lon_to.

water_bodies._doc: Mission Bay - the big water body just WEST of I-5 between I-8 and SR-52.

layouts._doc: Single freeroam layout over the whole freeway network. AC_START on I-8 near the SR-163 stack. Drive the loop either direction; every ramp is open.
